what_it_does: Lakebase is now generally available. Lakebase Autoscaling and Lakebase Provisioned are now unified in a single UI. GA includes autoscaling, scale to zero, instant branching, automated backups, point in time recovery, storage up to 8 TB, and expanded region availability.
why_it_matters: GA includes autoscaling, scale to zero, instant branching, automated backups, point in time recovery, storage up to 8 TB, and expanded region availability.

capabilities.desc: Deploy a Databricks App with automatic Lakebase connection.
